/usr/bin/c++ -O0 -ggdb -g CMakeFiles/combit_tests.dir/tests/test_bitmap_vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combit_tests.dir/tests/test_combit_decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combit_tests.dir/tests/test_combit_encoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combit_tests.dir/tests/test_bitmap_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combit_tests.dir/tests/test_compression.cpp.o -o combit_tests  src/core/combit/libcombit.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
